'''Huutar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. He was once hired by a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who owned a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]; the price for Huutar's services was set at one hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per day.
